title: BEM-659 trigger path diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def meta(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return {'path':path,'exists':p.exists(),'size':p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0}

def text(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

files={
 'codex_runner':'.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml',
 'telegram_smoke_wf':'.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml',
 'curator_hourly_wf':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'telegram_smoke_state':'governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json',
 'curator_hourly_state':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json',
 'delivery_verification':'governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json',
 'bem658':'governance/state/bem658_post_yaml_fix_delivery_check.json'
}
metadata={k:meta(v) for k,v in files.items()}
codex_text=text(files['codex_runner'])
telegram_text=text(files['telegram_smoke_wf'])
curator_text=text(files['curator_hourly_wf'])
smoke=load(files['telegram_smoke_state'])
hourly=load(files['curator_hourly_state'])
verify=load(files['delivery_verification'])
bem658=load(files['bem658'])

findings=[]
findings.append({'id':'F1','finding':'telegram-send-smoke.yml no longer contains heredoc markers','pass':'<<' not in telegram_text,'evidence':files['telegram_smoke_wf']})
findings.append({'id':'F2','finding':'telegram smoke result exists','pass':smoke is not None,'evidence':files['telegram_smoke_state']})
findings.append({'id':'F3','finding':'curator hourly state exists','pass':hourly is not None,'evidence':files['curator_hourly_state']})
findings.append({'id':'F4','finding':'codex-runner has actions write permission','pass':'  actions: write' in codex_text,'evidence':files['codex_runner']})
findings.append({'id':'F5','finding':'curator hourly keeps allowed schedule','pass':'schedule:' in curator_text and "cron: '0 * * * *'" in curator_text,'evidence':files['curator_hourly_wf']})

# Important architectural diagnosis: GitHub does not recursively trigger workflows from GITHUB_TOKEN commits. Record as suspected if result files absent after trigger.
smoke_missing_after_trigger=smoke is None or (isinstance(bem658,dict) and bem658.get('status') in ['yaml_fixed_results_pending','delivery_failed_or_pending'])
trigger_problem={'code':'PUSH_TRIGGER_FROM_GITHUB_TOKEN_NOT_RELIABLE','suspected':bool(smoke_missing_after_trigger),'message':'Commits made by GitHub Actions token may not trigger other workflows via push. Need explicit workflow_dispatch using actions:write or direct Deno/GitHub PAT dispatch.'}

status='needs_dispatch_repair' if trigger_problem['suspected'] else 'trigger_path_ok_or_results_present'
blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_TRIGGER_PATH_NOT_PROVEN','trigger_problem':trigger_problem} if status=='needs_dispatch_repair' else None

# Include first 120 lines of codex runner for next patch context.
runner_lines=codex_text.splitlines()
runner_preview=runner_lines[:160]
result={'schema_version':'workflow_trigger_path_diagnosis.v1','bem':'BEM-659','status':status,'metadata':metadata,'findings':findings,'trigger_problem':trigger_problem,'codex_runner_preview':runner_preview,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:52 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem659_diagnose_workflow_trigger_path.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem659_diagnose_workflow_trigger_path.md'
lines=['# BEM-659 | Diagnose Workflow Trigger Path','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:52 (UTC+3)', '', '## Status', status, '', '## Findings']
for f in findings:
    lines.append('- '+f['id']+' | '+f['finding']+': '+('PASS' if f['pass'] else 'FAIL')+' | '+f['evidence'])
lines += ['', '## Trigger problem', json.dumps(trigger_problem,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem659_diagnose_workflow_trigger_path','cycle_id':'bem659-diagnose-workflow-trigger-path','source':'monitor','status':status,'trigger_problem':trigger_problem,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:52 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem659_diagnose_workflow_trigger_path']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['workflow_trigger_path_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:52 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem659_diagnose_workflow_trigger_path.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-659: status='+status+' trigger_suspected='+str(trigger_problem['suspected'])+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed workflow trigger path and identified need for explicit workflow_dispatch repair if push-trigger results are absent')
"""
No issue comments.
